AGENTS.md.description: Project-level agent instructions and Sibu maintenance guidance.
changes: Routes rough future idea capture requests to the mandatory feature-idea-capture skill.

.codex/config.toml.description: Codex configuration pointing to AGENTS.md and rendering selected MCP servers with Codex-compatible settings.
changes: Adds approval prompts for GitHub MCP issue and sub-issue write tools in Codex configs.
Delegates Gemini project instructions to AGENTS.md as the source of truth.
Delegates Claude project instructions to AGENTS.md as the source of truth.

mcp/claude/.mcp.json.description: Claude MCP configuration template managed when selectable MCP servers are selected.
changes: Updates Claude GitHub MCP rendering to use the hosted HTTPS endpoint with an Authorization header instead of Docker.

mcp/gemini/settings.json.description: Gemini MCP configuration template managed when selectable MCP servers are selected.
changes: Updates Gemini GitHub MCP rendering to use the hosted streamable HTTP endpoint with an Authorization header instead of Docker.

skills/clean-code/SKILL.md.description: Mandatory clean-code skill installed once at the shared .agents/skills workspace path.
changes: Adds guidance to validate required function inputs before doing work instead of silently continuing with partial defaults.

skills/product-vision-writer/SKILL.md.description: Mandatory product vision writer skill installed once at the shared .agents/skills workspace path.
changes: Makes product vision discovery mandatory before drafting, even when existing context looks complete.

skills/deep-module-map-writer/SKILL.md.description: Mandatory Deep Module Map writer skill installed once at the shared .agents/skills workspace path.
changes: Makes Deep Module Map interviews mandatory before drafting, even when repo code or existing docs look complete.

skills/feature-brief-writer/SKILL.md.description: Mandatory feature brief writer skill installed once at the shared .agents/skills workspace path.
changes: Makes feature brief interviews mandatory before drafting while keeping export workflows delegated to dedicated exporter skills.

skills/technical-design-writer/SKILL.md.description: Mandatory technical design writer skill installed once at the shared .agents/skills workspace path.
changes: Makes technical design clarification mandatory before drafting while keeping export workflows delegated to dedicated exporter skills.

skills/typescript/SKILL.md.description: Selectable TypeScript skill installed when TypeScript language support is selected.
changes: Adds an optional TypeScript skill for projects that use .ts or .tsx files.

skills/golang/SKILL.md.description: Selectable Go skill installed when Go language support is selected.
changes: Adds an optional Go skill with concise, Effective Go–style guidance for .go files, package APIs, interfaces, errors, receivers, concurrency, and tests.

skills/postgresql-expert/SKILL.md.description: Selectable PostgreSQL Expert skill for practical database schema design and PostgreSQL-specific tradeoff guidance.
changes: Adds an optional PostgreSQL Expert database skill focused on simple schema design, data integrity, migrations, access patterns, and purposeful indexing.

skills/architecture/ddd-hexagonal/SKILL..description: Selectable back-end architecture skill for DDD and Hexagonal Architecture.
changes: Adds a framework-agnostic adapter dependency rule requiring delivery entrypoints to call application/orchestration boundaries instead of infrastructure or domain workflow internals.

skills/architecture/command-pattern/SKIL.description: Selectable architecture skill for command-oriented vertical slices using Command Pattern, Hexagonal Architecture, and DDD principles.
changes: Adds a framework-agnostic entrypoint dependency rule requiring delivery adapters to create commands and call handlers or dispatchers instead of infrastructure, SDKs, repositories, or domain workflow internals.

skills/nextjs/SKILL.md.description: Selectable framework skill for Next.js App Router and framework-specific behavior.
changes: Keeps Next.js boundary guidance architecture-agnostic by referring to the selected orchestration/application boundary instead of naming a specific architecture.

skills/react/SKILL.md.description: Selectable React skill for component design, props, state ownership, and presentational boundaries.
changes: Adds broadly applicable React screen componentization guidance so route and feature entry files stay thin while meaningful UI regions move into focused nearby files.

skills/scrum-master-planner/SKILL.md.description: Mandatory Scrum planner skill for creating pragmatic Epics and User Stories from approved feature and technical design docs.
changes: Keeps Scrum planning focused on local Epic and User Story artifacts and moves GitHub export workflow guidance to dedicated exporter skills.

skills/ai-implementation-planner/SKILL.m.description: Mandatory AI implementation planner skill for turning one approved User Story into small, story-local implementation step files.
changes: Clarifies that the planner is normally an executor helper and stops after planning only when planning-only is explicit.

skills/ai-implementation-plan-executor/S.description: Mandatory AI implementation plan executor skill for implementing full story plans before story-level review and commit.
changes: Clarifies that story and Epic planning requests are confirmation for executor implementation.

skills/feature-idea-capture/SKILL.md.description: Mandatory feature idea capture skill for storing rough future ideas in docs/feature-ideas.md only when the skill is used.
changes: Adds a mandatory feature idea capture skill for quick, raw idea storage without backlog or planning ceremony.

skills/ai-prompt-engineer-master/SKILL.m.description: Selectable AI prompt engineering skill for prompt creation, optimization, compression, and evaluation.
changes: Compresses the prompt quality checklist while preserving quality-first token discipline, missing-context behavior, output pattern, and prompt verification guidance.

skills/ux-expert/SKILL.md.description: Selectable UX expert skill for UI-changing features, responsive design, flows, states, accessibility, and binding mockups.
changes: Makes UX clarification mandatory before drafting while keeping export workflows delegated to dedicated exporter skills.

skills/architecture/layered-architecture.description: Selectable lightweight architecture skill for pragmatic controllers, services, models, and repositories guidance.
changes: Adds a Layered Architecture skill for smaller apps that need simple separation of concerns.

skills/export-to-github/SKILL.md.description: Selectable GitHub export skill for publishing a named feature's Epics and User Stories to GitHub issues and native sub-issues.
changes: Routes GitHub exports through the configured github-exporter sub-agent by default when available.

skills/export-to-notion/SKILL.md.description: Selectable Notion export skill for publishing a named feature's core documentation files to Notion.
changes: Routes Notion exports through the configured notion-exporter sub-agent by default when available.

.codex/agents/github-exporter.toml.description: Codex GitHub exporter sub-agent for Sibu feature Epic and User Story exports.
changes: Adds a Codex github-exporter sub-agent with clean-context and no-local-write export guidance.

.codex/agents/notion-exporter.toml.description: Codex Notion exporter sub-agent for Sibu feature documentation exports.
changes: Adds a Codex notion-exporter sub-agent with clean-context and no-local-write export guidance.

.claude/agents/github-exporter.md.description: Claude GitHub exporter sub-agent for Sibu feature Epic and User Story exports.
changes: Adds a Claude github-exporter sub-agent with clean-context and no-local-write export guidance.

.claude/agents/notion-exporter.md.description: Claude Notion exporter sub-agent for Sibu feature documentation exports.
changes: Adds a Claude notion-exporter sub-agent with clean-context and no-local-write export guidance.

.gemini/agents/github-exporter.md.description: Gemini GitHub exporter sub-agent for Sibu feature Epic and User Story exports.
changes: Adds a Gemini github-exporter sub-agent with clean-context and no-local-write export guidance.

.gemini/agents/notion-exporter.md.description: Gemini Notion exporter sub-agent for Sibu feature documentation exports.
changes: Adds a Gemini notion-exporter sub-agent with clean-context and no-local-write export guidance.
